title: Diedricks Attorneys: Where there's a will, there's a way
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Choose Diedericks Attorneys in Mossel Bay to write up your will for free. National Wills Week, run by the Law Society of South Africa (LSSA), is this week - 16 to 20 September. It offers the opportunity for members of the public to have their wills drawn up at no cost.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Choose Diedericks Attorneys in Mossel Bay to write up your will for free. National Wills Week, run by the Law Society of South Africa (LSSA), is this week - 16 to 20 September. It offers the opportunity for members of the public to have their wills drawn up at no cost."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"National Wills WeekAccording to the LSSA, National Wills Week has become a significant event in the legal profession’s social outreach, providing millions of members of the public access to justice initiatives. The success of National Wills Week is due to the thousands of attorneys, such as the team at Diedericks Attorneys, who generously contribute their time and expertise to assist people in drawing up a will.","html":"National Wills Week
According to the LSSA, National Wills Week has become a significant event in the legal profession’s social outreach, providing millions of members of the public access to justice initiatives. The success of National Wills Week is due to the thousands of attorneys, such as the team at Diedericks Attorneys, who generously contribute their time and expertise to assist people in drawing up a will."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Law firmsEvery year Diedericks Attorneys participate in National Wills Week, as do the thousands of law firms throughout South Africa, which must register with the LSSA to participate in this initiative.Diedericks Attorneys are conveniently centrally located in Church Street, in the leafy suburb of Linkside in Mossel Bay's upper town area. For your comfort, there is secure off-street parking at the premises.","html":"Law firms
Every year Diedericks Attorneys participate in National Wills Week, as do the thousands of law firms throughout South Africa, which must register with the LSSA to participate in this initiative.
Diedericks Attorneys are conveniently centrally located in Church Street, in the leafy suburb of Linkside in Mossel Bay's upper town area. For your comfort, there is secure off-street parking at the premises."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Why to have a will drawn up:Having a last will and testament, professionally drawn up, will ensure that your possessions are distributed among your loved ones according to your wishes, should you pass away.It will take the burden off your loved ones and contribute to some semblance of peace of mind in the event of your passing.","html":"Why to have a will drawn up:
Having a last will and testament, professionally drawn up, will ensure that your possessions are distributed among your loved ones according to your wishes, should you pass away.
It will take the burden off your loved ones and contribute to some semblance of peace of mind in the event of your passing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is advisable to have an attorney draw up your will, because an attorney has the necessary knowledge and expertise to ensure it is valid and complies with your wishes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Renthea Lindeque","html":"Renthea Lindeque"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Often a will is not valid because the person who drafts it does not have the necessary legal knowledge to ensure that the requirements of the law are met.","html":"Often a will is not valid because the person who drafts it does not have the necessary legal knowledge to ensure that the requirements of the law are met."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you die without leaving a valid will, your assets will be distributed according to the provisions of the Intestate Succession Act.","html":"If you die without leaving a valid will, your assets will be distributed according to the provisions of the Intestate Succession Act."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In this case, the following problems could arise:- Your assets may not be left to the person/s of your choice.- It can take a long time to have an executor appointed.- The executor who is appointed may be somebody you may not have chosen yourself.- There can be extra and unnecessary costs.- There can be unhappiness and conflict among members of your family because there are no clear instructions on how to distribute your assets.","html":"In this case, the following problems could arise:
- Your assets may not be left to the person/s of your choice.
- It can take a long time to have an executor appointed.
- The executor who is appointed may be somebody you may not have chosen yourself.
- There can be extra and unnecessary costs.
- There can be unhappiness and conflict among members of your family because there are no clear instructions on how to distribute your assets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Diedericks Attorneys was established in 1999 and consists of a dynamic team of attorneys that strives to provide fast, efficient, reliable and cost-effective services to its clients.","html":"Diedericks Attorneys was established in 1999 and consists of a dynamic team of attorneys that strives to provide fast, efficient, reliable and cost-effective services to its clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Besides experience in terms of many years in the profession, the team has a broad range of expertise and can assist you with any of the following:Family law, criminal law, commercial law, company registrations, competition law, contracts, property law and conveyancing, debt collection and consolidation, employment law and labour matters, litigation and motor vehicle accident claims.","html":"Besides experience in terms of many years in the profession, the team has a broad range of expertise and can assist you with any of the following:
Family law, criminal law, commercial law, company registrations, competition law, contracts, property law and conveyancing, debt collection and consolidation, employment law and labour matters, litigation and motor vehicle accident claims."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Monique Germishuizen","html":"Monique Germishuizen

"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Neil Moolman","html":"Neil Moolman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Make your appointment with a member of the Diedericks Attorneys team today.","html":"Make your appointment with a member of the Diedericks Attorneys team today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact details:Telephone: 044 690 3325/6Email: [email protected]Website: www.diedericksinc.co.zaAddress: 54 Church Street, Linkside, Mossel Bay.","html":"Contact details:
Telephone: 044 690 3325/6
Email: [email protected]
Website: www.diedericksinc.co.za
Address: 54 Church Street, Linkside, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
